name: TurboQuant KV Cache — Full-Document Long-Context Eval
blurb: Same architecture as current record (11L U-Net, LeakyReLU²+TTT+Muon). Novel eval change: replace sliding-window re-computation with TurboQuant-compressed KV cache. Each token now attends to its FULL preceding document instead of a 2048-token window. TurboQuant_mse (Zandieh et al. 2025, arXiv:2504.19874): normalize → random rotate → Lloyd-Max scalar quantize at 3 bits. Quality-neutral vs fp16 per paper §4.2. No training changes; eval-only improvement.
author: owen
